headline: 3 things investors Need to watch next week
summary: Yahoo Finance's Jared Blikre takes a look at the top stories for investors to watch this week, including SpaceX's (SPCX) first full day of trading as a public company, Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh's first interest rate decision on Wednesday, and earnings reports from Accenture (ACN) and The Kroger Co. (KR).

headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Steer Clear Of
summary: Retailers are evolving to meet the expectations of modern, tech-savvy shoppers. But many seem to be moving too slowly as their demand is lagging, causing the industry to underperform the market - over the past six months, retail stocks were flat while the S&P 500 climbed by 6.4%.

headline: How To Earn $500 A Month From Kroger Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
summary: Kroger has an annual dividend yield of 2.18% ($1.40 a year). To figure out how to earn $500 monthly, start with the yearly target of $6,000.

headline: Here’s Why The Kroger Co. (KR) is a Defensive Stock to Buy Amid Geopolitical Tensions
summary: Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is one of the best defensive stocks to buy amid geopolitical tensions. On June 3, Jefferies reiterated a Buy rating on Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) but cut the price target to $80 from $82. The price target cut comes amid concerns that the company is paying the price for US Food channels turning […]
